mapper.sql: id, user_id, item_id, price, quantity, filled_quantity, status, expire_time, auto_accept, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT bo.id, bo.user_id, bo.item_id, bo.price, bo.quantity, bo.filled_quantity, bo.status, bo.expire_time, bo.auto_accept, bo.created_at, bo.updated_at, i.id as item_resolved_id, i.item_id as item_item_id, i.name as item_name, i.name_cn as item_name_cn, i.category as item_category, i.sub_category as item_sub_category, i.quality as item_quality, i.rarity as item_rarity, i.exterior as item_exterior, i.icon_url as item_icon_url, i.buff_price as item_buff_price, i.steam_reference_price as item_steam_reference_price, i.steam_reference_currency as item_steam_reference_currency, i.steam_reference_price_source as item_steam_reference_price_source, i.steam_reference_price_updated_at as item_steam_reference_price_updated_at, u.id as buyer_id, u.username as buyer_username, u.avatar as buyer_avatar FROM buy_order bo LEFT JOIN item i ON bo.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON bo.user_id = u.id WHERE bo.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bo.created_at DESC

SELECT bo.id, bo.user_id, bo.item_id, bo.price, bo.quantity, bo.filled_quantity, bo.status, bo.expire_time, bo.auto_accept, bo.created_at, bo.updated_at, i.id as item_resolved_id, i.item_id as item_item_id, i.name as item_name, i.name_cn as item_name_cn, i.category as item_category, i.sub_category as item_sub_category, i.quality as item_quality, i.rarity as item_rarity, i.exterior as item_exterior, i.icon_url as item_icon_url, i.buff_price as item_buff_price, i.steam_reference_price as item_steam_reference_price, i.steam_reference_currency as item_steam_reference_currency, i.steam_reference_price_source as item_steam_reference_price_source, i.steam_reference_price_updated_at as item_steam_reference_price_updated_at, u.id as buyer_id, u.username as buyer_username, u.avatar as buyer_avatar FROM buy_order bo LEFT JOIN item i ON bo.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON bo.user_id = u.id WHERE bo.item_id = #{itemId} AND bo.status = 1 AND bo.filled_quantity < bo.quantity AND bo.expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY bo.price DESC, bo.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE buy_order SET filled_quantity = LEAST(quantity, filled_quantity + 1), status = CASE WHEN filled_quantity + 1 >= quantity THEN 2 ELSE status END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND filled_quantity < quantity
UPDATE buy_order SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 1 AND expire_time <= NOW()
